evalAfter: (async()=>{const w=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const b=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(b)b.click();await w(2600);for(let i=0;i<3;i++){const ig=[...document.querySelectorAll('a,button')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS igual/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(ig){ig.click();await w(500);}}try{MOS.nav('config')}catch(e){}await w(2000);try{MOS.setCfgTab('infra')}catch(e){}await w(4200);const tabs=document.querySelector('.cfgtabs');let sc=tabs.parentElement;while(sc&&!/(auto|scroll)/.test(getComputedStyle(sc).overflowY))sc=sc.parentElement;const c=document.getElementById('infraContenedor');const fleet=c.querySelector('.fleet');if(sc&&fleet){sc.scrollTop=fleet.getBoundingClientRect().top+sc.scrollTop-sc.getBoundingClientRect().top-120;}await w(600);const ig2=[...document.querySelectorAll('a,button')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS igual/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(ig2){ig2.click();await w(400);}return{done:true};})()
